digest.component_or_area: rebar reconciler orchestrate leaf-registry coverage tests
propositions: The existing 'real body' AST/regex heuristic is a structural proxy that passes even when a leaf targets the wrong entity, drops a field, returns a wrong follow-on, or swallows a required error.

Add a per-leaf behavioral effect matrix that drives each leaf with a mock Jira client and asserts the exact client/store method, target entity id/key, payload fields, returned ApplyResult, and follow-on effects.
The matrix is enumerated from _LEAVES itself and a test asserts every _LEAVES id has a matrix entry so newly-added leaves without coverage fail.
Every leaf with an error/exception path must assert that path's observable behavior, and leaves without error paths assert their success ApplyResult.
Avoid duplicating existing behavioral tests; already-covered leaves may use thin matrix entries referencing the same observable effect.
If retained, the AST heuristic is relabeled as a supplemental structural guard, not counted as behavioral coverage.
